name: Lucas Johnson
summary: Front-end Web Developer with nine years of professional experience. Team player who is at home in agile environments, has a keen eye for detail, strong communication skills, and who is able to adjust to the needs of any project.

experience.title: Front-end Developer
highlights: Built UI for the production application with React, TypeScript, and GraphQL

Worked closely with the design team to build, brainstorm, troubleshoot, and test new UI components for the internal design system used by all developers for the production application and marketing website
Wrote component and E2E tests with Cypress
Used Storybook to build UI and for visual regression testing

experience.title: Senior Front-end Developer
highlights: Built websites with TypeScript and Adobe Experience Manager for clients such as Hewlett-Packard and Scotia Bank
Created analytics Data Layers for Adobe Tag Manager for Cineplex
QA, cross browser testing to IE11, WCAG 2.0 AA standards
Deployed production builds to AWS

experience.title: Front-end Web Development and Design
highlights: Built websites with React JS/Redux for clients such as Telus and Longos
Created UX/UI designs with Sketch and Zeplin
Worked with static generator Gatsby JS
Integrated Netlify CMS into GraphQL websites
Deployed websites to Netlify

experience.title: Front-end Web Developer
highlights: Built websites with React JS/Redux for clients such as Paramount Films and Alberta Health Services
Worked with CMS platforms including WordPress and Prismic
Deployed production builds to AWS and Digital Ocean
Built Shopify templates

experience.title: Front-end Web Developer
highlights: Built HTML and JavaScript templates from Photoshop design comps
Wrote mobile-first responsive layouts with CSS, Bootstrap, Gulp and Grunt
Integrated builds into various CMS backends including WordPress and Kentico
Participated in daily scrums and development planning sessions

education.degree: BFA with Dist., Photography and Media Studies
